name: Tex-Mex Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Whole Kernel corn; including liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large saucepan.
2. Saute onion and sweet pepper with red pepper flakes until tender, stirring occasionally for about 2 minutes.
3. Add chicken broth and both cans of corn to the saucepan.
4. Continue cooking until very hot.
5. Stir in salt and pepper, then serve immediately.
Food exchanges per serving: 2 STARCH EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE (CHO: 31g; PRO: 6g; FAT: 8g; CAL: 205). For low-sodium diets, omit the salt and substitute unsalted broth and canned vegetables.
